pages.text:
1. Product Overview

DrawPost Agency AI Platform is a SaaS system designed to help digital marketing agencies automate social media marketing for multiple clients.

The system enables agencies to:
• Plan content
• Generate posts
• Schedule publishing
• Publish automatically
• Track performance
• Generate reports
• Analyze competitors

Core Objective:
Enable agencies to operate marketing on autopilot with strategic intelligence.

2. Target Users

Primary Users:
Digital marketing agencies managing 5–100 SMB clients.

Secondary Users:
Freelance marketers managing multiple brands.

3. Core Problem

Agencies spend significant manual effort on:
• Deciding daily content
• Creating repetitive posts
• Scheduling posts
• Publishing manually
• Preparing monthly reports
• Tracking competitors manually

This leads to:
• High manpower dependency
• Low scalability
• Inconsistent strategy

4. Product Vision

Add Client → Enable Autopilot → Marketing Runs Automatically.

With Competitive Intelligence:
Add Competitors → Gain Strategic Insights → Improve Positioning.

5. Product Modules

5.1 Agency Workspace
Dashboard shows:
• Total clients
• Clients on autopilot
• Scheduled posts
• Published posts
• Engagement trends
• Competitor comparison snapshot

5.2 Client Workspace
Each client includes:
• Brand profile
• Connected social accounts
• Content calendar
• Performance metrics
• Competitor list

5.3 AI Content Planner
Generates monthly calendar based on:
• Industry
• Geography
• Brand tone
• Competitor insights (if available)

Includes:
• Post date
• Post type
• Topic
• Hook
• CTA

5.4 AI Post Generator
For each planned topic:
• Caption
• Hashtags
• CTA
• Visual asset using templates

5.5 Smart Scheduling
Determines optimal posting time based on platform best practices.

5.6 Automated Publishing
Automatically publishes scheduled posts to Instagram & Facebook.
Notifies agency on failure.

5.7 Performance Dashboard
Displays:
• Engagement trends
• Post performance
• Growth indicators
• Top-performing posts

5.8 Automated Reporting
Generates monthly PDF reports including:
• Total posts
• Engagement summary
• Growth comparison
• Best performing post
• Competitor comparison insights

6. Competitive Intelligence Module

Purpose:
Provide agencies with automated competitor monitoring and insights.

Capabilities:

6.1 Competitor Setup
Agencies can add competitor social handles per client.

6.2 Competitor Monitoring
System tracks:
• Posting frequency
• Engagement levels
• Content type patterns

6.3 AI Insight Engine
AI analyzes competitor trends and generates:
• Content theme analysis
• Engagement comparison
• Strategic gaps
• Suggested positioning strategy

6.4 Dashboard Comparison
Displays:
• Client vs Competitor engagement comparison
• Posting frequency comparison
• Content type distribution comparison

6.5 Reporting Integration
Monthly reports include competitor performance summary and strategic insights.

7. Autopilot Mode

When enabled:
• Monthly content generated automatically
• Posts generated daily
• Posts scheduled automatically
• Posts published automatically
• Reports generated automatically
• Competitor insights considered in planning

When disabled:
• Content requires manual approval before publishing.

Owner – Full access
Manager – Manage clients & view reports
Viewer – Read-only access

9. MVP Scope

Included:
• Instagram & Facebook
• AI content planning
• AI caption generation
• Scheduling
• Automated publishing
• Monthly reports
• Basic competitor monitoring

Excluded:
• Paid ads automation
• WhatsApp automation
• AI image generation
• Multi-language support
• Advanced predictive analytics

10. Success Criteria

The platform succeeds when:
• Agencies manage 10+ clients autonomously
• Daily posting runs without manual effort
• Reports are auto-generated
• Competitor insights improve strategic positioning
